innateAbility.name: Dying Light
innateAbility.description: Deals damage over time to all enemy units centered around Phoenix based on its current health ratio.

abilities.name: Icarus Dive
abilities.description: Dives forward to the point-targeted direction in an arc with a fixed distance, then orbiting back to its original position.

abilities.name: Stop Icarus Dive
abilities.description: Immediately cancels and stops Icarus Dive.

abilities.name: Fire Spirits
abilities.description: Summons a number of fire spirits orbiting around Phoenix at the cost of its health.

abilities.name: Launch Fire Spirit
abilities.description: Each fire spirit can be launched independently at an area-targeted location. Applies damage over time and an attack speed slow on affected enemy units.

abilities.name: Sun Ray
abilities.description: Expels a light beam that damages enemy units at the cost of its own health. The longer the duration, the more the damage increases.

abilities.name: Stop Sun Ray
abilities.description: Immediately cancels and stops Sun Ray.

abilities.name: Toggle Movement
abilities.description: Phoenix moves forward slowly during Sun Ray while toggled on.

abilities.name: Supernova
abilities.description: Willingly ends its current life and transforms into a burning sun that scorches enemy units within the radius.The Phoenix Sun can only be destroyed by enemy heroes' attacks.

talents.right: +1.25% Sun Ray Max Health to Damage

talents.left: +1% Dying Light Missing Health as Damage
